column3: Note claimed production target of 22,695 short tons per year.
Reverted to this more traditional method because 'The calcination flowsheet was not successful in handling materials with high boron concentrations (searlesite minerals).'
Largely disregard this line; in 2024 disclosure, they shifted to a much more standard open pit extraction + sulfuric acid method, but also provided a less detailed disclosure as a result.
